problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: The key to Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? is Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region — specifically Glial cell activation/suppression — which would help 21,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
